response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a senior software developer, far exceeding the entry-level requirement. While they have relevant skills such as TypeScript and REST API understanding, their seniority and past roles may not align with the expectations of a junior/mid-level position.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript and other relevant technologies
Experience with full-stack development and various tech stacks
Strong background in software development with multiple projects and contributions
concerns: Significantly more experienced than the role requires, potentially leading to higher salary expectations or mismatch in job responsibilities
May lack recent experience with some of the specific technologies mentioned in the job description (e.g., React, Nest.js, PostgreSQL)
Not clear if they are willing to take on a less senior role or if they are looking for a change in their career path
